listings.name: Noord Villa
listings.notes: Dream Villa in Noord, Aruba – A Unique Investment Opportunity In the heart of enchanting Noord, Aruba, awaits a property that feels like it was crafted from a dream. Set on an expansive 24,650 sqft (2,290 m²) of meticulously fenced land, this estate offers privacy and security. A grand entrance welcomes you into a space where every detail has been thoughtfully designed. At the center stands the main villa, its terracotta roof and bright walls radiating warmth under the Caribbean sun. Step inside and discover the open-concept living and dining areas, flooded with natural light from large windows that highlight the fine finishes and sophisticated design. The fully equipped kitchen, complete with modern appliances and ample counter space, is perfect for culinary enthusiasts. The bedrooms provide a serene escape, with the main suite featuring an en-suite bathroom that feels like a private sanctuary. Venture outdoors and find yourself immersed in lush greenery and vibrant tropical landscaping. The hotel-resort-style surroundings evoke a sense of tranquility, where the rustling palm trees and the gentle ripple of the exquisite pool set the perfect ambiance. Imagine hosting evening gatherings here, with guests relaxing by the pool under the warm glow of outdoor lights and the gentle Caribbean breeze. Additional living spaces enhance the property’s value. Three separate apartments, each with its own private entrance, provide versatile options. The first is a spacious two-bedroom unit, complete with a kitchen, living area, and bathroom, ideal for long-term guests or generating rental income. The remaining two are cozy studio apartments, each with its own bathroom, perfect for short-term stays or additional rental opportunities. This villa offers not just a beautiful residence but a wise investment. Its prime location in one of Aruba’s most desirable areas ensures that whether you choose to call it home or leverage it for rental income, you’re set to enjoy the best of island living. With pristine beaches, exceptional dining, and vibrant shopping districts nearby, the possibilities are endless. As the sun sets over Noord, the villa’s lights illuminate the property with a warm, welcoming glow. This is a place where memories are created, and every day feels like a vacation. bike gps Property Details: Beds: 7 Baths: 5 Price (in AWG): 3,450,000.- Built up area: 541 m² / 5,823.27 ft² Land Size: 2,290 m² Reference Number: Noord Vill

listings.name: Eagle’s Hidden Gem – Dual-Parcel Estate with Bonus Buildable Lot
listings.notes: Just minutes from world-famous Eagle Beach, this private, move-in-ready two-level villa sits on a rare 1,280 m² of freehold land, combining a beautifully maintained residence with an adjoining bonus buildable lot (459 m² separate title). This configuration offers the flexibility to expand, subdivide, or reconfigure, making it both a luxury home and a strong long-term investment. Property Highlights – Land : 1,280 m² total | Two connected freehold parcels (821 m² + 459 m²) – Zoning : Stedelijk Woongebied (urban residential – medium density) – Construction : Exceptionally solid poured and reinforced concrete throughout – all floors, ceilings, roof, and corner reinforcements ensure durability and hurricane resistance. – Main villa : Two levels, each approx. 93 m² (total 186 m² built) • The downstairs level includes divided rooms (sheetrock partitions), a small kitchen counter with sink and outlets, a toilet, and independent access — ideal for reconfiguration into living units or offices. • With minimal internal adjustments, the space can be converted into one or two full apartments, doubling the home’s bedrooms and bathrooms and creating a 4–6 bedroom, 4-bathroom layout. – Guest/staff quarters : Separate bedroom and bathroom with private access – Outdoor area : Renovated pool with fenced deck, outdoor shower, and toilet – Outdoor living : Large covered patio with full outdoor kitchen and BBQ area – Garden & privacy : Fully paved garden and driveway, with remote-controlled gate and 3.5-meter-high perimeter walls ensuring total privacy. Mature tropical garden with multiple palm trees and lush greenery. – Utilities : Hot and cold water system | 10 kW solar installation | irrigation system | storm shutters throughout – Parking : Secure gated driveway for 2–3 cars, with remote-enabled electric gate Bonus Buildable Lot – 459 m² Freehold Parcel Included in the estate is a second buildable parcel (459 m² freehold) with its own meetbrief (confirming ownership and cadastral boundaries). This adjoining lot is fully fenced and accessible from the same gated entrance, offering multiple options: – Build a second residence, guest villa, or rental units – Extend the tropical garden or pool area for additional privacy – Subdivide and sell as a separate property in the future Investment Potential – Dual-parcel flexibility : Each parcel has its own meetbrief, allowing independent sale, new construction, or combined estate use. – Ready-to-convert lower level : Alrea

listings.notes: Inside, you’ll find 45 m² (484 ft²) of thoughtfully designed living space, while the highlight is your very own 26 m² (281 ft²) private outdoor area with direct access to the pool, just steps from your door. listings.name: Palm Aruba 216 – Your Private Oasis in the Heart of Palm Beach
listings.notes: Inside, this contemporary condo boasts a bright open layout, with two large sliding doors that fill the space with natural light. The sleek kitchen features a nice island with bar seating, plenty of cabinetry, and a washer and dryer smartly tucked away. At the back of the unit, you'll find two well-sized bedrooms with built-in closets. The primary suite has its own ensuite, while a second full bathroom serves the guest room.

listings.notes: Grand lobby, concierge service, 24-hour security, controlled access, property management, valet parking where applicable, housekeeping, maintenance, and owner or guest assistance.

listings.notes: Set in a quiet, more private area of the island, the location provides a peaceful retreat while still being just a 5‑minute drive to Eagle Beach, perfect for enjoying Aruba’s world‑famous coastline without the daily bustle. From your balcony, enjoy wide‑open views of the Aloe fields and the surrounding neighborhood.

Yet, still within easy reach of vibrant Palm Beach – perfect for exploring the island's diverse beaches at your leisure!

listings.name: House to finish for sale in Cura Cabai, San Nicolas
listings.notes: Discover a prime investment opportunity in San Nicolás, Aruba. This unfinished house is 2 minutes walk from the marineer camp. With nearby a brand new hotel and fresh developments in the area, San Nicolás is emerging as a top choice for investors. Unlike the overcrowded high-rise zones with skyrocketing prices, San Nicolás offers a peaceful, nature-surrounded escape. It’s one of the best ways to enter the Aruba market—especially for beginners looking for value. With several airbnb's in the neighborhood and a couple of beaches of 5 minutes distance and the well know Zeerovers close by with the aruba ocean villas and other restaurants, you are talking about a location that is booming and full of peace.

listings.name: Last Plots Property land in Noord - Napa Valley
listings.notes: Several lots available located in the quiet residential area of Shaba. Napa Valley is just minutes away from Eagle beach and several supermarkets, shopping centers and the Palm Beach area. This allotment plan is located in a Safe, family friendly area and is the perfect connection between Noord and Oranjestad. The infrastructure of Napa Valley is completed and the lots are ready to build on.Enjoy a relaxing way of living on this location with great traffic connection to the rest of the island! Lot sizes vary.

listings.name: Rooi Afo lot 431m2
listings.notes: The property is just a short drive from supermarkets, schools, and other everyday amenities, making it ideal for a family residence or a vacation home.

listings.name: Savaneta Land

listings.name: Weg Rooi Hundo Lot
listings.notes: The lot has recently been cleared. However, in its current condition, it isnot yet possible to obtain a building permit, as there is no approved Ministerial Decree in place and no road infrastructure has been constructed at this time. If you are looking to invest in land for the (long-term) future, this could present an interesting opportunity!

listings.name: Santa Helenastraat 23 Commercial building
listings.notes: The main building (3,504 m²) is centered around wide, open-air hallways that promote natural airflow. It contains over 25 multi-purpose rooms, including classrooms, laboratories, testing centers, and support spaces—all of which are individually climate-controlled with split-unit air conditioning and equipped with private bathrooms. These rooms can easily be reconfigured into offices, clinics, or retail units.

listings.name: Lux Villas with additional properties
listings.notes: Property description:This boutique luxury apartment complex offers a rare opportunity to own in one of Aruba’s most in-demand rental markets, just 5 minutes from Eagle Beach. Designed for high-performing short-term rentals, the property blends minimalist luxury with tropical appeal—exactly what today’s travelers are booking. With 9 turnkey apartments, a resort-style pool, and additional 3 plots for expansion with permission to construct an additional six apartments, this is an ideal acquisition for investors seeking strong cash flow, appreciation, and scalability.The Residences:Constructed in 2019 Lux Villas in Bubali, features 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms, sleeping 4 guests comfortably—a proven layout for maximizing occupancy and nightly rates. Open-plan living, private patios, and unique finishes create a strong competitive edge in Aruba’s luxury rental market, especially being just a couple minutes away from highlights like, Eagle Beach, restaurants, schools, supermarkets and gas stations.

listings.name: Wayaca 33D - commercial property
listings.notes: An exceptional opportunity to acquire a large-scale commercial complex in the highly strategic business district of Wayaca, located within close proximity to the Queen Beatrix International Airport. This versatile property offers a functional combination of office spaces, warehouse facilities, and extensive parking, making it ideal for logistics companies, distribution operations, import/export businesses, or corporate headquarters.

listings.name: Cadushi apartments
listings.notes: Cadushi Apartments offers an inviting outdoor area featuring a community pool, a covered patio, and a BBQ area, perfect for guests to gather and enjoy the tropical surroundings. The property’s vibrant exterior, adorned in colorful hues, enhances the island’s lively atmosphere and is complemented by lush palmtrees and tropical plants.

listings.name: Pega Pega Apartments
listings.notes: Pega Pega Apartments is an affordable yet promising investment opportunity located on a 601 m² parcel of land in the heart of Oranjestad, within walking distance of Surfside Beach. While the property may need updates, it presents remarkable potential for future growth and is already established as an attractive budget-friendly option for both short-term and long-term rentals. With its prime location, Pega Pega Apartments is ideal for those seeking a low-cost entry into the Aruban hospitality market.

listings.name: Authentic German Restaurant
listings.notes: Great Opportunity for Growth:While the restaurant is already thriving, there is significant potential for expansion. The introduction of catering services, increased social media presence, and more targeted marketing could help bring in even more customers. Additionally, the restaurant’s reputation and brand are already strong, giving the new owner a great foundation to build on.

listings.name: Santa Cruz 248
listings.notes: Positioned directly across from the busy Mundo Nobo Supermarket and on the road to the popular Huchada and Urataka Restaurants, this 873 m² parcel of land features a 281 m² built-up area, ready for renovation or a complete redesign. With constant foot traffic, excellent visibility, and easy accessibility, this property is perfect for a retail store, local eatery, office hub, or a multi-purpose commercial space.

listings.name: Prime Commercial Property on High-Traffic Main Road
listings.notes: With its significant size and prime location, this property offers a solid investment opportunity with potential for steady appreciation. Given its location near the harbor development area, it also presents possibilities for ambitious future development. Ideal for a range of uses, including retail, office space, or warehousing, this versatile property is perfect for strategic investment or as a dynamic startup location.
